</parameter>

sections.content:
Now I can see the full maze structure clearly. The blue block is at rows 26-30, cols 14-18. 
Looking at the layout:
- The blue block is in a narrow corridor on the left side (cols 14-18)
- To the right is a large white area extending from cols 20+ to about col 38
- There's a red horizontal structure at rows 38-42, cols 14-38
- Below the red structure, there's more white space at rows 42+
- The target blue area is at the bottom-right (rows 49-55, cols 43-49)
The red structure seems to block the path. I need to find a way around it. Looking at the maze:
- Row 38: WBRRRRRBWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWBRBWWWWWWWW - red at cols 14-18, then white
- Row 39: WBBRRRRBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBRBWWWWWWWW - red at cols 15-18, then black wall
- Row 40: WBRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRBWWWWWWWW - red across cols 14-38
- Row 41: WBBRRRRBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBWWWWWWWW - red at cols 15-18, then black
- Row 42: WBRRRRRBWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWWW - red at cols 14-18, then white
So the red structure forms a barrier at rows 38-42. The white area to the right of the red structure (cols 32-38) is accessible from above. I need to go RIGHT into the large white area, then navigate around the red barrier.
From the current position (rows 26-30, cols 14-18), I should try RIGHT to enter the large white area.

<parameter=code>

action(['RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
